message:
feat(websocket): replace ambient entropy with capability-plumbed EntropySource

The WebSocket client previously used getrandom::fill() directly for frame
masking, bypassing the Cx capability system. This was flagged as a critical
ambient audit finding.

Changes:
- Add entropy_handle() accessor to Cx for subsystems needing Arc<dyn EntropySource>
- WebSocket struct now carries an Arc<dyn EntropySource> field
- Add from_upgraded_with_entropy() constructor for explicit entropy injection
- Frame encoding methods now accept an EntropySource parameter instead of
  calling getrandom directly
- Split reader/writer halves propagate entropy through the split boundary
- send_frame/encode_frame_with_entropy plumbing throughout client.rs
- All masking paths now go through the capability system

This resolves the last critical ambient audit finding for entropy usage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
